title: Italian Forza Brainrot
description: A mod that adds to the famous ITALIANS BRAINROT memes!
body:
This chaotic and fun mod adds Brainrot Italians to your Minecraft world! Bring pure madness and memes straight into your gameplay with these unique characters.

![Slogan1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aabb9c732c5c2bb1c00a84f2a12f9438b2dfeb07_0.webp)


Available Entities

- Tralalero Tralala
- Orcalero Orcala
- Bombadiro Crocodilo
- Tung Tung Tung Sahur
- Ti Ti Ti Sahur
- Ta Ta Ta Ta Sahur
- La Esok Sekolah
- Br Br Patapim
- Lirili larilila
- Cacto Hipopotamo
- Orangutini Ananasini
- Giraffa Celeste
- Vaca Saturna Saturnita
- Ballerina Capuccina 
- Expressona Signora
- Capuccino Assasino
- Boneca Ambalabu
- Blueberrini Octopucini
- Garamaraman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung
- Elefantucci Bananucci
- Bananita Dolfinitta
- Udin din 


![Slogan2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d6b435fb1ac7001f42ff3a0c9869c04638812b7_0.webp)


Available Boss Entities

- PizzarottoMayonix
- Muscle  Tung Tung Tung Sahur
- Craftambum Tonitaca
- Fusion Brainrot


![Slogan3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561bbcf50ca70a424a9a4abe03847c89b19a9538_0.webp)


Available Kid Entities

- Kid Tralalero Tralala
- Los Tralaleritos dicen Tralalala
- Kid Tung Tung Tung Sahur
- Kid Bombadiro Crocodilo
- Kid Lirili Larilila
- Kid Br Br Patapim
- Kid Ballerina Capuccina 
- Kid Capuccino Assasino
- Kid Chimpanzini Bananini
- Kid Trulimero Trulichina


Each one brings their own bizarre energy and vibes to your world.
If this mod receives support, we’ll add more characters!
Got a crazy idea? Leave a suggestion! 😄




 Videos of Creators using the mod
